task.title: Clean Up Duplicate Topics
task.shortdesc: Reduce duplicate topic content and duplicate routing targets to improve package quality and migration speed.

prereq.p: Generate plan and execution reports to detect repeated source or target patterns.

step.cmd: Identify repeated topic targets in plan actions.
Identify repeated topic sources in execution metadata or action parameters.
Define canonical topics and update map references to point to canonical files.

info.p: Keep canonical naming stable so repeated runs produce consistent targets.

step.cmd: Regenerate artifacts and validate that duplicate routing counts decrease.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor run --package /path/to/package --docx-stem OutputDoc --target build/target --report build/execution-report.json jq '.summary' build/execution-report.json

result.p: Topic routing and map references are simpler, which reduces maintenance effort and lowers migration risk.
result.codeblock: duplicate target and source counts decrease across reruns plan actions route to canonical topic files
